docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF BUKOLA OGUNTALA RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OGUNTALA, BUKOLA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OGUNTALA, BUKOLA AS TO DEFENDANT TAWKIFY, INC. ( KENNETH SHAW )

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMNT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF BUKOLA OGUNTALA. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT TAWKIFY, INC. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAY-29-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TAWKIFY, INC. ( KENNETH SHAW )
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT - PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-19-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BUKOLA OGUNTALA IS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE WITH COURTCALL. DEFENDANT TAWKIFY INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE TRIAL. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE AUG-19-2019 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - TAWKIFY, INC. (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,647.00 FILED BY OGUNTALA, BUKOLA AS TO DEFENDANT TAWKIFY, INC. ( KENNETH SHAW ) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
